case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. MIKHAIL KOUTOUZOV

docket_entries.description: COURT TRIAL ON AUG-29-2022 FOR SHORT CAUSE COURT TRIAL/PROVE-UP HEARING - OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT GRANTED IN FAVOR PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. PROPOSED JUDGMENT WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY "FOR THE RECORD" COMMENCING AT 1:43 P.M. AND CONCLUDING AT 1:51 P.M. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Mikhail Koutouzov.
Dept: 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:43 p.m.

Adam Brumage, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Mariana Echeverria-Licona, Associate Vendor Managent Analyst and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Mikhail Koutouzov.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts (Open Book, Account Stated, Money Lent and Money Paid) filed September 27, 2021.
Defendant Mikhail Koutouzov's Answer to the Complaint filed January 3, 2022.
Notice of Time and place of Trial was served on April 19, 2022, setting trial for today, August 29, 2022. Matter assigned to Department 514 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up hearing.
Order STRIKING defendant Mikhail Koutouzov's answer to the complaint filed August 26, 2022.
Order Setting-Aside the striking of defendant's answer filed May 11, 2022.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief, Witness and Exhibit Lists filed today, August 29th.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Electronic Record of Account Application...................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Cardholder Agreement and Changes in Terms..................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Account Statements.........................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of plaintiff JPMorgan Bank, N.A., and against defendant Mikhail Koutouzov, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $9,380.92.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $0.00.
Total - $9,380.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 1:51 p.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Set For Trial On Aug-29-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
